description_long: This is a compact, open-frame utility trailer designed for transporting bicycles, featuring three parallel wheel channels with raised side rails for secure placement. The frame is constructed primarily from metal, with a blue-painted chassis and black wheel channels, and is supported by a single axle with two large wheels. The trailer includes a front hitch arm for attachment to a towing vehicle, and the rear is equipped with reflectors and tail lights for visibility and safety. The side rails and wheel channels are shaped to cradle bicycle tires, while the open design allows for easy loading and unloading. The structure is reinforced with crossbars and brackets, ensuring stability and durability during transit. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for function and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A blue and black open-frame utility trailer with three wheel channels for carrying bicycles, supported by two large wheels and a front hitch arm. It features side rails, reflectors, and tail lights for safety and secure transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three parallel wheel channels, the blue hitch arm, and the side rails for securing bicycles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the single axle with two large wheels, the length of the wheel channels, and the blue-painted frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail lights, reflectors, and the open ends of the wheel channels for easy loading.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheel arrangement and the structure of the frame.
